title: lapsana communis subsp. communis
intro: Lapsana communis subsp. communis, also known as Nettle-leaved Catchfly or Lapsana, is a subspecies of the Lapsana communis plant, a type of flowering plant in the mallow family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lapsana communis subsp. communis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
